// 02 — projects
What I've Built
AI-Based Interview Monitoring & Evaluation System
UptoSkills · Feb 2026 – Present

An intelligent proctoring platform for online interviews, assessments, and examinations. Features webcam-based analysis, real-time gaze tracking, object detection, and live risk scoring. Implements multi-speaker detection using offline K-Means clustering with Librosa and OpenAI Whisper for speech analysis. Built three modular sub-systems: Failure Handling & Recovery Engine, AI Interview Intelligence Engine with adaptive difficulty, and a Real-Time Interview Integrity Monitor.

PythonFastAPIFlask PostgreSQLOpenAI WhisperK-Means ML LibrosaPydanticOpenCV MediaPipeYOLOv8WebSocket
Blood Donor & Donation Management System
BCA Final Project · Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University

A full-stack web application for managing blood donation records, donor registration, and blood inventory. Built complete frontend and backend enabling efficient donor-recipient matching and blood bank management. Won 1st place in the university poster presentation for Blockchain Technology.
